## How was this tested?

- [ ] Builds (`scripts/build/build_uefi.ps1`)

## Checklist

- [ ] My changes follow the existing code style and conventions.
- [ ] I did **not** introduce any secrets, tokens, or credentials.
- [ ] I considered the security impact (syscall caps, W^X/NX/SMAP/CET, sandbox,
      boot integrity) and noted anything relevant below.
- [ ] If this is a security fix, I reported it privately first (see SECURITY.md).
